name: Gold-Silver Ratio Tracker with Opportunity Alerts

parameters.message:
=Dear Investor,

Please find below the latest automated analysis from the Gold-Silver Ratio Monitoring System.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  MARKET DATA SUMMARY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Gold Price (INR)     :  {{ $('Ratio > BuySilver Threshold?').item.json.goldPrice }}
  Silver Price (INR)   :  {{ $('Ratio > BuySilver Threshold?').item.json.silverPrice }}
  Gold-Silver Ratio    :   {{ $('Ratio > BuySilver Threshold?').item.json.ratio }}
  

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  SIGNAL & ANALYSIS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Signal               :  {{$json.signal}}
  Insight              :  {{$json.insight}}

  Interpretation:
  {{$json.interpretation}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  THRESHOLD REFERENCE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Buy Silver Threshold :  Ratio > 80  →  Silver undervalued
  Buy Gold Threshold   :  Ratio < 60  →  Gold undervalued
  Neutral Zone         :  60 ≤ Ratio ≤ 80  →  No action

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  DISCLAIMER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  This report is generated automatically by the Gold-Silver Ratio
  Monitoring System and is intended solely for informational purposes.
  
  The signals and analysis presented herein are based on pre-configured
  quantitative thresholds and do NOT constitute financial advice,
  investment recommendations, or an offer to buy or sell any security
  or commodity.

  Past ratio patterns are not indicative of future performance.
  Always conduct your own due diligence and consult a SEBI-registered
  financial advisor before making any investment decision.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This is a system-generated communication. Please do not reply to this email.

Regards,
Gold-Silver Ratio Monitoring System
Automated Market Intelligence | Powered by GoldAPI.io
parameters.subject: = Gold-Silver Ratio Alert | {{$json.signal}} | Ratio:{{ $('Calculate Gold-Silver Ratio').item.json.ratio }}

parameters.content:
# Gold-Silver Ratio Tracker with Opportunity Alerts
### This workflow monitors gold and silver prices in real-time, calculates the Gold-Silver ratio, and generates automated investment signals. It fetches live prices from GoldAPI, computes the ratio, and evaluates it against predefined thresholds to determine whether gold or silver is undervalued. Based on this analysis, it generates a structured signal (Buy Gold, Buy Silver, or Hold) along with detailed insights and interpretation. Finally, it sends a formatted email alert with market data, signal explanation, and reference thresholds to the configured recipient.

# Setup Steps

## Configure Master Node
Set up the Configuration node with your GoldAPI key, alert email, currency, and threshold values for buy signals.

## Connect API Access
Ensure your GoldAPI key is valid and added correctly in the Configuration node for both gold (XAU) and silver (XAG) requests.

## Add Trigger
Use the Manual Trigger for testing or replace it with a Cron node for automated periodic execution.

## Fetch Market Data
Use HTTP Request nodes to fetch real-time gold and silver prices from GoldAPI.

## Format Price Data
Map the API response to extract goldPrice and silverPrice fields for further processing.

## Merge & Calculate Ratio
Merge both price streams and calculate the Gold-Silver ratio using a Code node.

## Apply Signal Logic
Use IF nodes to compare the ratio against thresholds:
- Ratio > threshold → Buy Silver  
- Ratio < threshold → Buy Gold  
- Otherwise → Hold  

## Generate Signal Output
Assign signal type and enrich it with insight and interpretation using a Code node.

## Send Email Alert
Use the Gmail node to send a detailed alert including prices, ratio, signal, and analysis.

## Monitor & Adjust
Track signals over time and adjust thresholds in the Configuration node as needed.

## Trigger & Configuration

Initializes the workflow and sets required variables like API key, thresholds, currency, and email.
Ensures all downstream nodes use consistent configuration values.

##  Gold Price Fetching

Fetches real-time gold price (XAU) from the API.
Extracts and formats the price into a usable field (goldPrice).

## Silver Price Fetching

Fetches real-time silver price (XAG) from the API.
Extracts and formats the price into a usable field (silverPrice).

## Data Merge & Ratio Calculation

Combines gold and silver data into a single dataset.
Calculates the Gold-Silver ratio for analysis.

## Buy Silver Condition

Checks if the ratio is above the upper threshold.
Identifies when silver is undervalued compared to gold.

## Buy Gold Condition

Checks if the ratio is below the lower threshold.
Identifies when gold is undervalued compared to silver.

## Signal Assignment

Assigns Buy Silver, Buy Gold, or Hold based on conditions.
Adds structured insight and interpretation for the signal.

## Final Processing & Alert

Merges all signals and formats the final output report.
Sends a detailed email alert with prices, ratio, and analysis.
